title: Run State Schema
description: Ashfall v0.1 save/load contract. Defines the minimal serializable snapshot of an in-progress or completed run. A saved run can be reconstructed deterministically from this record combined with the event/node catalogs and the original seed.

schema_version.description: Schema version identifier. Must match 'run_state/0.1' for this format.

save_format.description: Save format type. 'snapshot' is the only supported format in v0.1 — it captures the full state at a single point in time.

seed.description: The run seed used to initialize all random decisions. Combined with the event/node catalog, this makes the run deterministically replayable from the start.

map_seed.description: The map seed used to initialize map generation. May differ from run seed if the engine supports separate map/run seeds.

player.description: The player resource state at the time of save.

current_node.description: The node_id of the node the player is currently at.

visited_nodes.description: Ordered list of node_ids visited during this run, including the current node.

ended.description: Whether the run has ended (victory or death).

victory.description: Whether the run ended as a victory. Only meaningful when ended is true.

end_reason.description: The reason the run ended. Null if the run is still in progress.

decision_log.description: Optional: ordered list of decisions made so far. Required for analytics and replay. If omitted, the run cannot be replayed from the save point — only the current resource state is restored.

saved_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the save was created. Optional but recommended for debugging.
